creator: harpo@javanet.com
text:
The pcemu package installation does not setup the vga font, so the default font is used (which looks *really* bad)

Fix: 

run mkfontdir in the directory containing the font (which, on my system is /usr/local/lib/pcemu/font). Also, don't forget to add that directory to your X font path in /etc/XF86Config
How-To-Repeat: Install pcemu via sysinstall off of the 2.1.5 cdrom or ftp.
